Re: Senator Richard Blumenthal
Dear Madame Secretary:
We are writing on behalf of Senator Richard Blumenthal. Enclosed please find Senator
Blumenthal’s Periodic Disclosure of Financial Transactions (“PTR”) for transactions dated
May 13, 2024 and May 21, 2024.
Please do not hesitate to call us should you have further questions. Thank you for your attention
to this matter.
Very truly yours,

Kate Sawyer Keane
